description: Read FBA inventory, orders, sales reports, listings, and catalog data for an Amazon seller account.

auth_env_var_specs.name: SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_ID
auth_env_var_specs.description: LWA client ID from your private SP-API application.

auth_env_var_specs.name: SP_API_LWA_CLIENT_SECRET
auth_env_var_specs.description: LWA client secret from your private SP-API application.

auth_env_var_specs.name: SP_API_REFRESH_TOKEN
auth_env_var_specs.description: Refresh token from self-authorizing your private SP-API application.

catalog_description: Run Amazon seller workflows from the terminal: FBA inventory, orders, sales reports, listings, catalog lookup, and account operations.
